blocks.content: Now you'll edit the default notification policy to set your preferred contact point and grouping configuration.
To edit the default policy, complete the following steps:
On the default policy row, click the **More** button (⋯) to open the actions menu.

Click **Edit** from the dropdown menu.

The default policy editing form opens in a modal.

Select a **contact point** from the dropdown.

This is where all unmatched alerts are delivered. Choose the channel your team monitors most closely, for example a general Slack channel or an email distribution list.

Configure the **Group by** setting.

Group by determines which alerts are batched into a single notification. Common options:

- `alertname`, `grafana_folder` (default): one notification per rule per folder
- `alertname`: one notification per rule
- Empty: all alerts in one notification

Select the labels that give your responders the most useful notification subject line.

Click **Update policy** to save your changes.

The modal closes and the policy tree refreshes with your updated settings.

Your default policy now controls where unmatched alerts are delivered and how they are grouped.

In the next milestone, you'll review what you accomplished.
